case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, VS. TAMMY THOMAS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2011 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,839.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, TAMMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.94) SERVED APR-29-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, TAMMY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, TAMMY $2,839.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,894.94, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, TAMMY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
